title: Recording / Mixing / Mastering Engineer
bio_ja: 1985年東京生まれ。シンセサイザーとサンプリングで曲を作るなかで音響と機材に興味を持ち、エンジニアリングへ傾倒、現在に至る。好きなものは大きい音像と大きい服と大きい本屋。機材と猫は大きくても小さくても好きです。ジャンルと時代を問わず、人が作り上げたものを大事にしています。
bio_en: Born in Tokyo in 1985, I began making music with synthesizers and sampling, and through that process developed a deep interest in sound and audio equipment, which eventually led me into engineering. I love big soundscapes, oversized clothes, and large bookstores. When it comes to gear and cats, I like them both big and small. Across all genres and eras, I deeply value what people create.
equipment_note: *Please refer to the studio materials of Arte Refact for information on the recording equipment.
